@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個以 shared core 同步服務 daily brief、single-stock committee 與 Windows desktop 的台股研究網站。 Taiwan Stock Radar is a Taiwan-stock research site whose shared core serves the daily brief, the single-stock committee, and the Windows desktop app.

@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個開源台股研究產品，以 shared core 同步服務每日 08:30 日盤報告、單股委員會、CLI 與 Windows desktop app。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan-stock research product whose shared core powers the daily 08:30 brief, the single-stock committee, the CLI, and the Windows desktop app.
